title: pelargonium × limoneum
intro: Pelargonium × limoneum, also known as lemon scented geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus, characterized by its distinctive lemon fragrance and vibrant flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × limoneum include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
